problem id: 1c671acc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  10110010 -> 11011101
  10010011 -> 11011100
  00100000 -> 10000001
  01101100 -> 11110011
  11110000 -> 11000111
  00000111 -> 00111100
  00011011 -> 11111100
  11011101 -> 11111110
  11111000 -> 11100111

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 11111101
